## Checklist
- [ ] Wrote the failing test first, then implemented (TDD).
- [ ] `npm run check` (tsc ×4 + biome) passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes (note if real-pi goldens/PTY were skipped because `pi`/`expect` is absent).
- [ ] Conventional commit messages; each commit self-consistent.
- [ ] No append-only invariant regressed (no JSONL mutation; no double-write of summary + decision record; latest-per-tool crop protection intact; pitree/standalone panel never writes).
- [ ] New UI surface? Reviewed an HTML mockup first.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and any affected docs.
